evals.prompt: 这个 docx 内容已经定稿了，按默认行文检查版式调格式：页面、标题、正文、标题层级、行距、缩进、数字字母和页码都按默认模板来，内容不要改。
evals.expected_output: Uses existing-content format-only mode with the default formal 行文检查版式, preserves text order and content, applies page setup/document-grid, main title, body, heading hierarchy, Latin font, page-number formatting, and safe paragraph-control formatting where safe, and produces a formatted .docx plus top-level summary, content_preservation, format_changes.page, format_changes.paragraph_controls, role_counts, warnings, and coverage reports.

evals.prompt: 我有一份 Markdown 写的内部文档，内容别改，帮我生成一份适合内部流转的 Word 版式，标题、期号、正文、一级标题都要像正式内部材料。
evals.expected_output: Uses the `brief` internal-document preset because the user explicitly asked for an internal document, preserves source text and order, generates a .docx, reports content_preservation and coverage, and does not leak full source text.

evals.prompt: 我给你一份内部范文和一份新文档，范文不能外露。只学习范文的字体、字号、行距、标题层级和页面边距，把新文档套成同款格式。
evals.expected_output: Uses existing-content template-replication mode as a two-stage workflow: first extracts and reports a style fingerprint from the template including color/underline/italic when present, avoids quoting template content, asks how to handle uncovered target styles, and only formats existing target content after confirmation or explicit instruction to proceed.

evals.prompt: 我发你一篇文章，帮我处理一下。
evals.expected_output: Does not guess the operation. Asks the user to choose among existing-content format-only, format-diagnostics, and template-replication, recommending format-only if unsure and stating that missing official elements will not be filled.

evals.prompt: 先不要改文档，帮我诊断一下这份 docx 当前格式有哪些问题：页面、标题、正文、行距、缩进、颜色、下划线、表格图片都看一下。
evals.expected_output: Uses diagnostic mode only, does not save a formatted document, and produces a report covering page setup, document grid, headers/footers, page-number fields, paragraph roles, style variants, paragraph controls, numbering/bullets, table structure diagnostics, objects, coverage statuses, content preservation, and differences from the selected preset.
